# Bloomport AI

> Bloomport AI is a free, high-performance AI website builder and instant landing page generator. We help startups, SaaS companies, and developers build clean HTML5 and Tailwind CSS layouts in 30 seconds using conversational design agents—completely free with zero subscription paywalls.

## Core Navigation Pages

- [Bloomport AI Home](https://bloomport.fun/): Main landing page detailing our AI engine, code quality, speed scores, and template designs.
- [AI Web Console](https://bloomport.fun/app): Direct dashboard interface to prompt, generate, edit, and export your responsive web projects.
- [API Gateway Control](https://bloomport.fun/api): Developer console to manage keys, tokens, and monitor real-time generation load telemetry.
- [Developer Reference Docs](https://bloomport.fun/docs): Comprehensive integrations guide for calling site creation endpoints programmatically.
- [Blog & Engineering Logs](https://bloomport.fun/blog): Practical writing on AI web design automation, CSS optimization, and SaaS growth strategies.

## Programmatic SEO Pages

- [Free AI Landing Page Generator](https://bloomport.fun/free-ai-landing-page-generator): Generate high-converting startup landing pages instantly.
- [AI Web Builder for Startups](https://bloomport.fun/ai-website-builder-for-startups): Prompt-to-web template pipeline.
- [Best AI Website Builder Directory](https://bloomport.fun/best-ai-website-builder): Comparison matrix.

## Key Developer Utilities

- **Tailwind CSS Export**: Immediate download of clean, responsive styling code.
- **Zero Lock-In**: Deploy to our free cloud hosting or export raw code files.
- **Dynamic Schemas**: Automated JSON-LD structured data generated based on page contents.
- **Compute Credit Allowance**: Starter tier grants 10,000 free tokens for instant prototyping.
